title: elymus longifolius
intro: Elymus longifolius, also known as the longleaf wheatgrass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Elymus longifolius include its ability to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and reduce stress levels. Elymus longifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
